bootup_message.description: Message shown when system boots up, {version} will be replaced with actual version
bootup_message.text:
All good vibes loaded
{version}
WLAN - goodvibes
Pass. - goodvibes123

welcome_title.description: Main welcome message displayed at startup

welcome_decoration.description: Decorative text shown after welcome title

separator.description: Separator line used between quote sections

finish_prefix.description: Prefix before the random adjective. {word} will be replaced with a random adjective

adjectives.description: List of random adjectives used in the finish message

error_csv_load.description: Error message when CSV file fails to load

error_no_data.description: Error message when no data is available to select

error_encoding.description: Error message when text encoding fails
